system.description:
The psyker generates a savage storm of force bolts. Each Round the power is maintained, the psyker may select a number of targets equal to his Psy Rating. Makes a BS Test to hit each target; deals 2d10 Impact Damage + 2 per Psy Rating. No target may be hit more than once per Round.

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Telekinetic Weapon

XP Cost: 500
